params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine. Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak dining table (36-42" recommended), rattan pendant, multi-panel bay window visible, stoneware vase centerpiece, round oak dining table (scale to 7.8 x 8 ft bay), rattan pendant over table, simple neutral chairs (2-4 visible), visible multi-panel window/bay. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: quiet minimalism balanced with earthy textures, natural wood tones, and selective layering. Prioritize horizontal lines, low-profile furniture, tactile materials (linen, wool, rattan), and visible daylight from large openings. Add a compact standing-desk work corner in the living area and a small crib in the bedroom without disrupting the serene composition. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
